## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Kubernetes version**: (e.g. 1.30)
- **Browser**: (e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- **Deployment method**: (Docker / in-cluster / `make dev`)

## Logs / Screenshots

Add any relevant logs or screenshots here.
